creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Don’t skip this hidden gem in London 🇬🇧

This place is so close to a lot of the main tourist attractions in London, but you’ve got to know where it is to get there 😎

📍St Dunstan in the East Church Garden

🚇 The nearest tube stations are Monument and Tower Hill

I’d suggest going there on a weekday before lunch as that’s usually the most quiet time to visit ✌️

Have you been to St Dunstans? 🇬🇧

#london #hiddengems #lovegreatbritain

geo_locations: St Dunstan in the East Church Garden
pinned_places: St Dunstan in the East Church Garden

transcription.text: Here's a hidden gem in London that a lot of tourists skip even though it's only a 2 minute walk from the Tower of London. This church has been severely damaged so many times and since the Blitz during World War 2 where it was completely destroyed, it's been a ruin and a public garden. I just love to come here, take in the historic vibe and just chill out on a bench and look at the beautiful ruins and the squirrels.
